name: automating-database-backups
description: Automate database backup processes with scheduling, compression, and encryption. Supports PostgreSQL (pg_dump), MySQL (mysqldump), MongoDB (mongodump), and SQLite. Generates production-ready backup scripts with retention policies and restore procedures. Trigger: "automate database backups", "schedule backups", "create backup script", "disaster recovery". Use when working with automating database backups. Trigger with 'automating', 'database', 'backups'.
